text: Moving through this dim, quiet space, I feel isolated, as if I've stumbled into a hidden corridor of thought. The clinical lighting contrasts with the vague shapes and silent rooms around me, creating an atmosphere of suspense. I am acutely aware of my own presence, pondering why the silence here feels so dense and why darkness breeds such introspection. The partial words on the wall remind me of incomplete ideas—potential untapped, or mysteries yet to be understood.
